name: Amex MRCC
rewards: Receive a welcome gift of 4,000 Bonus Membership Rewards Points upon paying the joining fee and spending INR 15,000 within the first 90 days of card membership.
Earn 1 Membership Rewards Point for every INR 50 spent, with exclusions on fuel, insurance, utilities, cash transactions, and EMI conversions at the point of sale.
Earn an additional 1,000 Bonus Membership Rewards Points each calendar month by using your card 4 times on transactions of INR 1,500 or more.
Get a further 1,000 Membership Rewards points by spending INR 20,000 or more in a calendar month, which requires enrollment.
Receive 5,000 Membership Rewards Points upon your first year card renewal, provided the annual membership fee is paid.
Redeem your Membership Rewards Points for various options from the 24 Karat Gold Collection, such as a Taj voucher worth INR 14,000 or a Shoppers Stop voucher worth INR 10,000.
Redeem your Membership Rewards Points for options from the 18 Karat Gold Collection, including a Taj voucher worth INR 9,000 or a Shoppers Stop voucher worth INR 7,000.
You can redeem Membership Rewards Points for E-Vouchers, shopping with points, or using points for travel.
Points can also be utilized to pay your card charges.
The card offers a comprehensive Membership Rewards Programme for earning points on your spending.
fees: The first year annual membership fee for the card is INR 1,000 plus applicable taxes.
From the second year onwards, the annual membership fee increases to INR 4,500 plus applicable taxes.
The INR 4,500 annual membership renewal fee can be 100% waived if the total spends on the card in the immediately preceding membership year are INR 1,50,000 or more.
A 50% waiver on the annual membership renewal fee is provided if total spends on the card in the preceding membership year are between INR 90,000 and INR 1,49,999.
There is a 0% convenience fee on fuel purchases at HPCL for transactions less than INR 5,000.
A 1% convenience fee is applicable on fuel purchases at HPCL for transactions of INR 5,000 and above.
perks: Convert your large purchases into easy monthly instalments with American Express EMI.
Enjoy the flexibility to pay your credit card bill fully or partially.
Receive exciting discounts of up to 20% on dining at select partner restaurants.
Access 24X7 card-related assistance for all your support needs.
Benefit from comprehensive dispute resolution services to address transaction discrepancies.
Enjoy zero liability for lost cards, protecting you from unauthorized charges.
Receive emergency card replacement services for quick recovery if your card is lost or damaged.
Utilize the contactless payment feature for fast and secure transactions.
Manage your account effortlessly with online tools for PIN management, personal detail edits, and alerts.
Explore exclusive Amex Offers to unlock additional savings and privileges.
